title: Version 0.0.5 Blocked
message: This specific test version contains a critical bug in the database, causing medication reminders to fail. Please update immediately to the latest version to continue using the app.

title: Version 0.0.9 Expired
message: Version 0.0.9 was a temporary beta version for testing the new interface. This testing phase has now ended. Please download the latest stable release from GitHub.
